title: SFT Friction Fixes — UX issues discovered during planner session

issues.title: Fix arm sources sync non-zero exit on partial filesystem failure
issues.dod: arm sources sync exits 0 when at least one source synced successfully; only exits non-zero when zero sources could be synced; error messages for individual failed sources still printed to stderr; go test ./cmd/armature/... passes.
acceptance: arm sources sync exits 0 when a filesystem source is missing but other sources sync OK

issues.title: Fix decompose-apply splitting comma-separated scope into multiple entries
issues.dod: internal/decompose/apply.go splits issue.Scope on ', ' (comma-space) producing one scope entry per file instead of one entry containing the whole string; go test ./internal/decompose/... passes including new test for multi-file scope.
acceptance: After decompose-apply, a task with scope 'foo.go, bar.go' has two scope entries not one
arm validate reports no phantom scope for existing files specified in scope

issues.title: Fix armature-planner skill showing wrong version type in plan.json example
issues.dod: skills/armature-planner/SKILL.md updated so the plan.json example shows version as integer 1 (not string "1"); make skill regenerates .claude/skills/armature-planner/SKILL.md; arm decompose-apply accepts the corrected example without error.

issues.title: Add blocked_by and blocks display to arm show
issues.dod: arm show <ID> output includes blocked_by list and blocks list when non-empty; format consistent with existing fields; go test ./cmd/armature/... passes including new TestShow_BlockedBy test.
acceptance: arm show SFT-S1-T2 output includes blocked_by: [SFT-S1-T1]
